message.content: Yes, there is a vertical numbered navigation sidebar on the left. It displays sequential section titles (01 Intro, 02 Manifesto, 03 Stack, 04 Work, 05 About, 06 GitHub, 07 Contact) in a vertical list. Each entry includes a two-digit number (e.g., "01", "02") followed by the section name. The sidebar also features thin horizontal marker lines (likely orange or similar) that visually separate each numbered entry, creating a structured, hierarchical look. The text is aligned vertically along the left edge, with the numbers and section names in a clean, readable font.
